title: SAP Inventory Dashboard Suite
tagline: Streamlit web app that consolidates 7 SAP export files and generates interactive inventory analysis dashboards.
description: A two-stage data processing and visualisation tool built with Streamlit. Stage 1 consolidates 7 different SAP CSV export files (Material Master, Vendor Master, Plant Master, Purchasing Info Records, Stock Movements, Purchase Orders, Stock Balance) into a single unified dataset. Stage 2 runs advanced inventory analysis — Top-N material and vendor rankings, cumulative monthly trend tracking, and tied-up capital calculations — and outputs interactive Plotly dashboards plus standalone HTML and Excel reports. Deployable locally or via Docker.
highlights: Consolidates 7 SAP CSV exports into one unified dataset
Automatic movement type classification (incoming / outgoing / transfers)
Top-N material and vendor analysis with configurable N value
Cumulative monthly trend charts per material
Exports standalone HTML dashboard + Excel report
Runs locally or via Docker on port 8501

items: Sample SAP CSV datasets used for development and testing
Source code and Docker Compose setup
restricted.label: Source code, sample data, and configuration details are available on request
